summary: Matrix source with solid sound quality captures a vibrant show highlighted by Phil’s sweet vocals on “Gimme Some Lovin’” and Jerry’s rare, exuberant Candyman moment.
review: The three five‑star reviews praise this recording as a pleasant matrix capture that sounds clean enough to enjoy without any noted flaws. Musically the concert shines especially on Phil’s unusually cute vocal delivery in “Gimme Some Lovin’” and Jerry’s spontaneous “oh” vocalization plus a great solo during “Candyman,” while the second set is described as loose and fun. Overall the performance is celebrated for its warmth and energy, making it a worthwhile addition to any Deadhead collection.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 5‑star ratings, highlighting strong musical moments and noting no recording problems; the matrix source is described positively, leading to a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call it a “nice source” with no complaints about clarity or drop‑outs; implies a clean, listenable matrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as loose and fun; overall vibe praised as warm and engaging, with highlighted vocal moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Rare, unselfconscious “oh” vocalization in Candyman and a great solo noted.
band_member_comments.Phil: Unusually cute vocal tone on Gimme Some Lovin’, possibly inspired by personal joy.
